negative_variants.description: String Sformat Mode Tag: forces the main output to zero, so coarse compilation passes but behavioral stimulus points fail.
String Sformat Mode Tag: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
String Sformat Mode Tag: mishandles reset or initialization, passing steady-state samples but failing startup or recovery checks.
String Sformat Mode Tag: keeps the main datapath plausible while reporting the wrong metric value.
String Sformat Mode Tag: uses a shifted or inverted decision condition that can pass one mode but fails boundary cases.
